reviews: Been bringing both our cars here for two years. Consistent quality and they always go the extra mile.
No-nonsense auto shop. Fair prices, quality work, and they actually explain what they're doing.
Honest mechanics are hard to find. These guys diagnosed the issue in 20 minutes and didn't try to upsell me.
description: Motor City Auto Repair provides expert auto repair and maintenance with transparency and integrity. Our certified technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostics to keep your vehicle running at its best.
